name: Sangenpai Transcendent Dragion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>燦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>トランセンド・ドラギオン
desc:
1 Dragon Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Dragon monsters
All monsters your opponent controls must attack, if able. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects during the Battle Phase. If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can change all monsters on the field to Attack Position. If 3 or more attacks have been declared this turn (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your GY, then you can destroy 1 card on the field. You can only use this effect of "Sangenpai Transcendent Dragion" once per Duel.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires Type specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Type specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
